title: Real L0 git worktree runner
objective: Replace the runner fallback-only behavior with a real git worktree execution path when git is available, keeping fallback mode for non-git demos.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Runner creates a worktree under .harness/tmp/worktrees/<run-id> when the target is a git repo.
Runner executes inside the worktree and collects patch.diff back to .harness/runs/<run-id>.
Runner cleans up the worktree unless cleanup=false.
Fallback mode still works when git is unavailable or repo is not initialized.

koObjective: 작업마다 git worktree를 만들고 실행·검증·정리하는 L0 실행기를 구현한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
